### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>openshift/imagebuilder (github.com/openshift/imagebuilder)</summary>

### [`v1.2.9`](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.9)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.8...v1.2.9)

#### What's Changed

-   healthcheck: add support for `--start-interval` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/280](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/280)
-   Don't expand RUN heredocs ourselves, let the shell do it by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/281](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/281)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.8...v1.2.9

### [`v1.2.8`](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.8)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.7...v1.2.8)

#### What's Changed

-   healthcheck: add --start-interval by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [#​280](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/280)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.7...v1.2.8

</details>
